description: Same forward-compat gap as Status: TaskType (src/task.rs:17-42) hard-errors on unknown serde variants. A future 'spike' / 'feature' / 'chore' type would break older clients loading the whole task file. Mirror LinkType: add Unknown(String), custom Deserialize that falls through, TaskType::parse stays strict at the CLI layer. Simpler than Status because TaskType has no precedence logic. Add a round-trip test (future_type_variant_round_trips_through_task_file) in tests/gates_compat.rs style.
title: Lenient TaskType deserialization (preserve unknown)
